entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A small grain crop, Pennisetum glaucum (L.) R. Br., traditionally adapted to marginal environments.

entities.name: INDIVIDUAL GRAIN MASS
entities.description: The mass or size of a single grain in pearl millet.

entities.name: MARGINAL ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: Environments to which pearl millet is traditionally adapted.

entities.name: HERITABILITY
entities.description: The measure of the proportion of phenotypic variation due to genetic factors, noted as low to moderate for individual grain mass.

entities.name: PROGENY TESTING
entities.description: A genetic improvement method based on evaluating the offspring of a plant.

entities.name: ICMS 7703
entities.description: A modern open-pollinated cultivar of pearl millet.

entities.name: RECURRENT S1 PROGENY SELECTION
entities.description: A selection process involving two cycles of S1 progeny selection to increase grain mass while maintaining yield.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD POTENTIAL
entities.description: The potential amount of grain produced per unit area.

entities.name: TEST ENVIRONMENTS
entities.description: The ten different environments used to evaluate the selection cycles.
